title: Main Window Manager
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Main Window Manager**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Create and manage the primary Electron `BrowserWindow` hosting the Studio renderer.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Main Window Manager**. Local mode runs `createKernel` in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Create and manage the primary Electron `BrowserWindow` hosting the Studio renderer.

rules.requirement: window title reflects the active project or connection
rules: When a local project is open, the title MUST include the project name; for remote-only sessions, the title MUST include the API host or profile label.

rules.requirement: window close prompts when dirty editors exist
rules: If the artifact editor has unsaved buffers, closing the window MUST prompt the user before discarding (delegate to UI state).

scenarios.requirement: window title reflects the active project or connection
scenarios.name: Local project name in title bar

scenarios.name: Remote connection shows host

scenarios.name: Title updates on profile switch

scenarios.name: Close blocked while editor dirty
then: AND close aborted if user cancels

scenarios.requirement: window close prompts when dirty editors exist
